message:
fix(tools): add find_rg_binary helper and respect workspace .gitignore in grep/find

Introduce find_rg_binary() (mirrors find_fd_binary) to probe for
"rg" or "ripgrep" once via OnceLock and cache the result for the
process lifetime.  GrepTool now uses this helper and returns a clear
tool error when ripgrep is unavailable instead of an opaque OS error.

Both GrepTool and FindTool now pass the workspace-level .gitignore
(self.cwd) as --ignore-file in addition to the search-root .gitignore,
with deduplication when the two paths are identical.  This fixes ignore
rules being silently skipped when searching from a subdirectory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
